# STRAT.021 ? Cognitive Behavioral (CBT)

**Type:** PHILOSOPHY
**Category:** strategic_frameworks
**Subcategory:** psychological_frameworks
**Domain:** PSYCHOLOGICAL_FRAMEWORKS
**Status:** active

## Core Principles
Thoughts affect feelings and behavior; identify cognitive distortions; challenge irrational thoughts; behavioral experiments; present focus

## Application
Identify thought patterns; recognize distortions; challenge and reframe; test through behavior; focus on current not past; practical exercises

## Key Values
- Thought-feeling-behavior link
- Cognitive restructuring
- Behavioral testing
- Present focus
- Practical change

## Tags
philosophy, strategic-framework, psychological_frameworks

## Notes
Strategic framework ingested into philosophy library per operator mapping rule.
